prompt:
Generate a meticulously detailed, vertical composite photograph illustrating the life progression of the uploaded handsome man, specifically maintaining the unique facial structure of the person, age 30, which will be provided as an input image. The image is a cascading stack of six distinct individuals, linked by precise feature continuity.
Top Layer (Future): 'Confident 57-Year-Old Adult' with salt-and-pepper hair, in a mature suit, features weathered but clearl.
Next Layer: 'College-Age Young Adult (20–30 years)'—This is the prime 30-years-old state of the person with stylish hair and well groomed, in a premium crisp white shirt, looking ambitious.
Third Layer: 'Teenager (14–17 years)' - A slightly younger person, in a school hoodie, with clear facial structure.
Fourth Layer: 'Cheerful School Kid (6–8 years)' As a smiling child with a backpack, in a polo shirt.
Fifth Layer: 'Toddler (1–2 years)' As an inquisitive toddler in a striped onesie.
Sixth Layer: 'Newborn Baby (0 months)' The base layer, as a sleeping infant swaddled in soft fabric.
The entire composition has a smooth, soft-light gradient background from cool blue to warm amber. Each age label is precisely typeset next to its figure, using the exact text like 'Confident 57-Year-Old Adult (Adult)'. Features must remain identical across ages, just aged or de-aged. Organise each photo from bottom left to top right. Shot with a professional studio finish, hyper-realistic, 8k. Use provided photo as reference for the 25 years old me. Aspect ratio 2:3
